signals.title: AUD/USD — G10 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7056 — 60bp AUD carry advantage over USD. USD 1W avg: +0.521% (n=7) vs AUD 1W avg: -0.694% (n=4) — G10 spread: 1.215%. Strong theme favors USD; AUD weakness to continue as data disappoints. Watch for AUD/USD to test 0.70 on sustained USD strength.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1566 — EUR COT LF net short -22,320. IV at 7.1% vs HV30 at 4.5% — 2.6% vol-pt premium over realized. 25d RR at -0.54: mild put skew despite short speculative positioning. Market hedging, not chasing; late-trend caution. Watch for EUR/USD to hold below 1.16.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Carry + COT Divergence
signals.text: USD/JPY at 160.19 — 300bp USD carry advantage over JPY. JPY COT LF net short -105,136. USD/JPY 25d RR at -1.14: moderate put skew. Intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.00. Watch for USD/JPY to test 160.50 on carry and speculative positioning divergence.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Vol Regime
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.339 — IV at 11.0% vs HV30 at 6.5% — 4.5% vol-pt premium over realized. Elevated hedging demand over realized vol; watch for GBP/USD to remain volatile. GBP/USD 25d RR at -0.73: mild put skew.

signals.title: USD/CAD — Carry
signals.text: USD/CAD at 1.3935 — 150bp USD carry advantage over CAD. Watch for USD/CAD to hold above 1.39 on carry. USD/CAD 25d RR at +0.28: near neutral.
